title: Binnayaga caves
tagline: Binnayaga caves — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Binnayaga Buddhist Caves also known as Vinayaka or Vinayaga are located at village Binnayaga in the state of Rajasthan, India.
overview.description: Binnayaga Buddhist Caves also known as Vinayaka or Vinayaga are located at village Binnayaga in the state of Rajasthan, India. The excavation has around 20 laterite caves facing south from east to west. This is monastic complex, the cells are smaller than Kolvi Caves cell. The stupa shaped sanctuary is the highlight of these caves.

topPlaces.name: Hathiagor Buddhist Caves
topPlaces.description: Hathiagor Buddhist Caves are located at village Pagaria in the state of Rajasthan, India. The caves are located on hill called Hathiagor-ki-Pahadi.

topPlaces.name: Kolvi Caves
topPlaces.description: Kolvi Caves, or Kholvi Caves, are located at Kolvi village of Jhalawar district in the state of Rajasthan, India. They are on a hill carved out of laterite rock.

items.note: Hathiagor Buddhist Caves are located at village Pagaria in the state of Rajasthan, India. The caves are located on hill called Hathiagor-ki-Pahadi.
Kolvi Caves, or Kholvi Caves, are located at Kolvi village of Jhalawar district in the state of Rajasthan, India. They are on a hill carved out of laterite rock.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Binnayaga caves?
faq.a: The best time to visit Binnayaga caves is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Binnayaga caves?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kota Airport (122 km) and the nearest railway station is Kota Junction (126 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Binnayaga caves?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Binnayaga caves at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Binnayaga caves?
faq.a: Stays in Binnayaga caves start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Binnayaga caves?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hathiagor Buddhist Caves, Kolvi Caves.
